requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Household Refrigerating Appliances (JSMO energy-efficiency technical regulation)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——家用制冷器具（JSMO能效技术法规）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——家用製冷器具（JSMO能效技術法規）

summary.en: Jordan operates a mandatory minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) regime for household electrical appliances, including refrigerators and freezers, administered through JSMO together with the energy-efficiency programme supported by national energy authorities. Refrigerating appliances must meet a minimum energy-efficiency threshold before they can be cleared and placed on the Jordanian market; products below the MEPS floor are not permitted. The energy-efficiency class and annual energy consumption are determined using test methods drawn from the IEC 62552 series (adopted as Jordanian Standards), consistent with the GSO/IEC measurement basis used across the region. The MEPS thresholds and the energy-class boundaries are defined by the applicable Jordanian energy-efficiency technical regulation and may be aligned with GSO regional energy-efficiency requirements; exporters must confirm the current threshold values and class boundaries with JSMO and the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 约旦对包括电冰箱和冷冻箱在内的家用电器实行强制性最低能效标准（MEPS）制度，由JSMO会同国家能源主管部门支持的能效计划管理。制冷器具须达到最低能效门槛方可通关并投放约旦市场；低于MEPS下限的产品不被允许。能效等级与年耗电量采用源自IEC 62552系列的测试方法（已采纳为约旦标准）测定，与本地区通行的GSO/IEC测量基础一致。MEPS门槛值及能效等级边界由适用的约旦能效技术法规规定，并可能与GSO区域能效要求对齐；出口商须向JSMO及当地进口商确认现行门槛值与等级边界。
summary.zht: 約旦對包括電冰箱和冷凍箱在內的家用電器實行強制性最低能效標準（MEPS）制度，由JSMO會同國家能源主管部門支持的能效計畫管理。製冷器具須達到最低能效門檻方可通關並投放約旦市場；低於MEPS下限的產品不被允許。能效等級與年耗電量採用源自IEC 62552系列的測試方法（已採納為約旦標準）測定，與本地區通行的GSO/IEC測量基礎一致。MEPS門檻值及能效等級邊界由適用的約旦能效技術法規規定，並可能與GSO區域能效要求對齊；出口商須向JSMO及當地進口商確認現行門檻值與等級邊界。

standards_or_laws: JSMO energy-efficiency technical regulation for household refrigerating appliances — mandatory MEPS floor; products below threshold not permitted
JS / IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (adopted measurement basis for MEPS and labelling)
GSO regional energy-efficiency requirements — possible alignment basis (confirm current values with JSMO)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing grades (Grade 1 most efficient through Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR, with the energy labelling system administered by NDRC. Measurement aligns with the IEC 62552 series via GB/T 8059. The GB 12021.2 grade boundaries and EEI basis are set for the Chinese market and are not the same numeric thresholds as Jordan's MEPS — a Chinese Grade 1/2 rating does not by itself prove compliance with the Jordanian MEPS floor and must be re-assessed against the Jordanian threshold values.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效至5级最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性，由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展改革委（NDRC）管理。测量通过GB/T 8059与IEC 62552系列对齐。GB 12021.2的等级边界与EEI基础针对中国市场设定，与约旦MEPS的数值门槛不同——中国1级/2级评定本身不能证明符合约旦MEPS下限，须按约旦门槛值重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效至5級最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性，由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展改革委（NDRC）管理。測量通過GB/T 8059與IEC 62552系列對齊。GB 12021.2的等級邊界與EEI基礎針對中國市場設定，與約旦MEPS的數值門檻不同——中國1級/2級評定本身不能證明符合約旦MEPS下限，須按約旦門檻值重新評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Both China and Jordan ultimately measure energy performance using the IEC 62552 series, so the underlying test data is broadly portable, but the compliance gap is in the thresholds and the regulatory floor: (1) Different MEPS values — Jordan's mandatory minimum threshold and energy-class boundaries are set independently (and may be aligned with GSO regional values), so a Chinese Grade 1/2 product must be re-checked against the Jordanian MEPS floor; passing GB 12021.2 does not guarantee passing the Jordanian MEPS. (2) Below-threshold ban — products that do not meet the Jordanian MEPS floor cannot be imported or placed on the market, irrespective of their Chinese grade. (3) Test report basis — the energy data submitted for the Jordanian energy class must be derived from IEC 62552 measurements acceptable to JSMO; exporters should confirm whether existing IEC 62552-based reports (or CB-linked energy data) are accepted, or whether re-testing is required.
gap.zh: 中约最终均以IEC 62552系列测量能效，故底层测试数据大体可移植，但合规差距在于门槛值与监管下限：（1）MEPS值不同——约旦的强制最低门槛与能效等级边界独立设定（并可能与GSO区域值对齐），故中国1级/2级产品须按约旦MEPS下限重新核查；通过GB 12021.2不保证通过约旦MEPS。（2）低于门槛即禁——不达约旦MEPS下限的产品无论中国等级如何，均不得进口或投放市场。（3）测试报告依据——为约旦能效等级提交的能效数据须源自JSMO可接受的IEC 62552测量；出口商应确认现有基于IEC 62552的报告（或CB关联能效数据）是否被接受，抑或须重新检测。
gap.zht: 中約最終均以IEC 62552系列測量能效，故底層測試數據大體可移植，但合規差距在於門檻值與監管下限：（1）MEPS值不同——約旦的強制最低門檻與能效等級邊界獨立設定（並可能與GSO區域值對齊），故中國1級/2級產品須按約旦MEPS下限重新核查；通過GB 12021.2不保證通過約旦MEPS。（2）低於門檻即禁——不達約旦MEPS下限的產品無論中國等級如何，均不得進口或投放市場。（3）測試報告依據——為約旦能效等級提交的能效數據須源自JSMO可接受的IEC 62552測量；出口商應確認現有基於IEC 62552的報告（或CB關聯能效數據）是否被接受，抑或須重新檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Jordanian MEPS floor must be met before import clearance and market placement; products below threshold are not permitted
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Jordan applies a mandatory MEPS floor to household refrigerators measured on the IEC 62552 basis. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades use the same measurement family but different threshold values; a Chinese Grade 1/2 rating must be re-checked against the Jordanian MEPS floor. Products below the Jordanian threshold cannot be imported. Confirm current MEPS values with JSMO and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 约旦对家用电冰箱实行基于IEC 62552测量的强制MEPS下限。中国GB 12021.2等级使用相同的测量族但门槛值不同；中国1级/2级评定须按约旦MEPS下限重新核查。低于约旦门槛的产品不可进口。须向JSMO及进口商确认现行MEPS值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 約旦對家用電冰箱實行基於IEC 62552測量的強制MEPS下限。中國GB 12021.2等級使用相同的測量族但門檻值不同；中國1級/2級評定須按約旦MEPS下限重新核查。低於約旦門檻的產品不可進口。須向JSMO及進口商確認現行MEPS值。

requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency Label — Jordan Energy Label for Refrigerating Appliances (JSMO labelling technical regulation)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——约旦制冷器具能效标签（JSMO标识技术法规）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——約旦製冷器具能效標籤（JSMO標識技術法規）

summary.en: In addition to meeting the MEPS floor, household refrigerating appliances sold in Jordan must carry a Jordanian energy-efficiency label issued under the applicable JSMO labelling technical regulation. The label displays the energy-efficiency class and the annual energy consumption (kWh/annum), with class determination based on IEC 62552 series measurements. The label must be affixed/displayed at point of sale, and label text/content is expected in Arabic for the local market. The Jordanian label scheme is administered through JSMO and the national energy-efficiency programme; it is distinct from the EU's EPREL pre-registration database — Jordan does not operate an EU-style centralized public product registry for energy labels, so the obligation is the physical label plus the conformity dossier rather than an EPREL-style database upload (confirm current label format, class scale, and any registration step with JSMO and the importer).
summary.zh: 除满足MEPS下限外，在约旦销售的家用制冷器具还须依据适用的JSMO标识技术法规携带约旦能效标签。标签标示能效等级及年耗电量（千瓦时/年），等级判定基于IEC 62552系列测量。标签须在销售点加贴/展示，标签文字/内容预期采用阿拉伯语以适应当地市场。约旦标签方案由JSMO及国家能效计划管理；其与欧盟EPREL预注册数据库不同——约旦不实行类似欧盟的集中式公共产品能效标签登记库，故义务为实体标签加符合性档案，而非类EPREL的数据库上传（须向JSMO及进口商确认现行标签格式、等级体系及任何登记步骤）。
summary.zht: 除滿足MEPS下限外，在約旦銷售的家用製冷器具還須依據適用的JSMO標識技術法規攜帶約旦能效標籤。標籤標示能效等級及年耗電量（千瓦時/年），等級判定基於IEC 62552系列測量。標籤須在銷售點加貼/展示，標籤文字/內容預期採用阿拉伯語以適應當地市場。約旦標籤方案由JSMO及國家能效計畫管理；其與歐盟EPREL預登記數據庫不同——約旦不實行類似歐盟的集中式公共產品能效標籤登記庫，故義務為實體標籤加符合性檔案，而非類EPREL的數據庫上傳（須向JSMO及進口商確認現行標籤格式、等級體系及任何登記步驟）。

standards_or_laws: JSMO energy-label technical regulation for refrigerating appliances — mandatory energy-efficiency label at point of sale
JS / IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for the declared energy class and annual consumption
Arabic-language label content expected for the Jordanian market

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale and annual energy consumption, administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no centralized pre-registration database. The Chinese CEL is in Chinese, uses a 1-to-5 grade scale, and is designed for the domestic market — it cannot serve as the Jordanian energy label, which uses its own class scale and Arabic-language content.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版），展示1至5级评级及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级；无集中式预注册数据库。中国能效标识为中文、采用1至5级评级、面向国内市场——不能充当约旦能效标签，后者采用自有等级体系及阿拉伯语内容。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版），展示1至5級評級及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級；無集中式預登記數據庫。中國能效標識為中文、採用1至5級評級、面向國內市場——不能充當約旦能效標籤，後者採用自有等級體系及阿拉伯語內容。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The Chinese CEL cannot be reused for Jordan: (1) Different label — the Jordanian energy label uses its own class scale and Arabic-language content; the Chinese 1-to-5 CEL must be replaced by the Jordanian label for products sold in Jordan. (2) No EPREL-style registry — unlike the EU, Jordan does not require an EPREL-type centralized database upload, so the practical obligation is producing the correct physical Jordanian label and including energy data (IEC 62552 basis) in the JSMO conformity dossier; confirm with JSMO whether any model registration step exists. (3) Class derivation — the energy class shown on the Jordanian label must be derived against the Jordanian class boundaries, which differ from the Chinese grade boundaries; re-mapping from a Chinese grade to the Jordanian class is required. The importer typically coordinates label production and placement in Jordan.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不可在约旦复用：（1）标签不同——约旦能效标签采用自有等级体系及阿拉伯语内容；在约旦销售的产品须以约旦标签替换中国1至5级能效标识。（2）无类EPREL登记库——与欧盟不同，约旦不要求类EPREL集中式数据库上传，故实际义务为制作正确的约旦实体标签并将能效数据（IEC 62552基础）纳入JSMO符合性档案；须向JSMO确认是否存在型号登记步骤。（3）等级换算——约旦标签所示能效等级须按约旦等级边界判定，该边界与中国等级边界不同；须将中国等级重新映射至约旦等级。标签制作与张贴通常由约旦进口商协调。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不可在約旦複用：（1）標籤不同——約旦能效標籤採用自有等級體系及阿拉伯語內容；在約旦銷售的產品須以約旦標籤替換中國1至5級能效標識。（2）無類EPREL登記庫——與歐盟不同，約旦不要求類EPREL集中式數據庫上傳，故實際義務為製作正確的約旦實體標籤並將能效數據（IEC 62552基礎）納入JSMO符合性檔案；須向JSMO確認是否存在型號登記步驟。（3）等級換算——約旦標籤所示能效等級須按約旦等級邊界判定，該邊界與中國等級邊界不同；須將中國等級重新映射至約旦等級。標籤製作與張貼通常由約旦進口商協調。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Jordanian energy-efficiency label required at point of sale; no EU-style EPREL pre-registration database (confirm any model registration step with JSMO)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Jordanian energy-efficiency label (Arabic content, Jordanian class scale, IEC 62552 basis) is mandatory at point of sale for refrigerators. The Chinese CEL does not transfer. Jordan does not operate an EU-style EPREL public registry, so the obligation is the physical label plus energy data in the JSMO conformity dossier — confirm the current label format and any registration step with JSMO and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 约旦能效标签（阿拉伯语内容、约旦等级体系、IEC 62552基础）是电冰箱在销售点的强制要求。中国能效标识不可转移。约旦不实行类似欧盟的EPREL公共登记库，故义务为实体标签加JSMO符合性档案中的能效数据——须向JSMO及进口商确认现行标签格式及任何登记步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 約旦能效標籤（阿拉伯語內容、約旦等級體系、IEC 62552基礎）是電冰箱在銷售點的強制要求。中國能效標識不可轉移。約旦不實行類似歐盟的EPREL公共登記庫，故義務為實體標籤加JSMO符合性檔案中的能效數據——須向JSMO及進口商確認現行標籤格式及任何登記步驟。
